name: machship-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the Machship freight management platform

machship_api_token.title: Machship API Token
machship_api_token.description: Your Machship Bearer token (Settings → API → Generate token)

machship_api_url.title: Machship API URL
machship_api_url.description: Override the Machship API base URL (default: https://live.machship.com)

transport.title: Transport Mode
transport.description: How the server communicates: 'stdio' for AI desktop clients (default), 'http' for web integrations

port.title: HTTP Port
port.description: Port for HTTP transport mode (default: 3000, only used when Transport Mode is 'http')
